---
title: "Supplementary material: spatial covariates"
author: "Alexandra Strang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 1.0 Document set up

This document contains the description of the spatial covariates used in the LGCP model and the code used to generate them. 

Each terrain covariate was calculated from the 2m Reference Elevation Model of Antarctica (REMA). 

The python script to calculate the terrain covariates from REMA 

## 2.0 Terrain slope

Terrain slope 

## 3.0 Terrain roughness

## 4.0 Terrain roughness index

## 5.0 Aspect
